title: X.

source.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

verses.book: Fragments from the Lost Writings of Irenæus
verses.text: It is indeed proper to God, and befitting His character, to show mercy and pity, and to bring salvation to His creatures, even though they be brought under danger of destruction.

verses.book: Fragments from the Lost Writings of Irenæus
verses.text: “For with Him,” says the Scripture, “is propitiation.”
